name: Sales Tools – UK SaaS
product_context: We sell Outbound.io, a B2B sales prospecting and outreach platform, to UK-based SaaS and tech companies with 10–150 employees. Their pain point is that the sales team spends too much time manually researching leads and lacks a repeatable outbound process. A buying signal is that they recently hired a Sales Development Rep, Head of Growth, or VP Sales, or they raised Series A/B funding. The decision maker is the VP of Sales or Head of Revenue. Skip bootstrapped solo founders, agencies, and companies that already use Salesforce with a full RevOps team.

segments.name: UKSaaS
segments.description: UK-based B2B SaaS companies with 10–150 employees that have a sales team but no mature outbound process
segments.icp_context: UK B2B SaaS company, 10–150 staff, growing sales team, no dedicated RevOps

tld_queries: site:.co.uk "B2B SaaS" OR "software platform" "VP Sales" OR "Head of Sales" hiring
site:.co.uk "SaaS" "Series A" OR "Series B" 2023 OR 2024 UK
site:.co.uk "software company" "SDR" OR "sales development" "join our team"
extra_queries: UK B2B SaaS company 10-150 employees "VP of Sales" OR "Head of Growth" hiring 2024
London OR Manchester "SaaS startup" "Series A" sales team growing
"outbound sales" UK tech startup "SDR" OR "BDR" job posting
site:techcrunch.com UK SaaS Series A 2024 sales

segments.name: UKFintech
segments.description: UK fintech and insurtech companies with 10–150 employees building outbound sales motions
segments.icp_context: UK fintech or insurtech, 10–150 staff, B2B focus, expanding sales team

tld_queries: site:.co.uk "payments" OR "lending" OR "insurance" platform "SDR" OR "VP Sales"
extra_queries: UK fintech B2B 50-150 employees "VP Sales" OR "Head of Revenue" 2024
London fintech Series A 2024 sales hiring
UK insurtech OR regtech "outbound" OR "prospecting" sales team
site:fintechfutures.com UK B2B fintech Series A 2024

signals.name: Recent Funding
signals.description: Raised Series A or B in the last 18 months
signals.llm_definition: Mark Yes if the company announced a Series A or B funding round within the last 18 months. This is a strong signal they are investing in growth and likely building out their sales team. Mark No if they are bootstrapped, pre-seed, or if the last funding was more than 2 years ago.

signals.name: Sales Hiring
signals.description: Actively hiring SDRs, AEs, or sales leadership
signals.llm_definition: Mark Yes if the company has open roles for SDR, BDR, Account Executive, VP of Sales, or Head of Growth in the last 90 days. Mark No if no relevant sales roles are open.

signals.name: No Outbound Stack
signals.description: No evidence of an outbound sales tool
signals.llm_definition: Mark Yes if the company shows no sign of using outbound tools (no mention of Outreach, Salesloft, Apollo, Lemlist, or similar in job postings or website). Mark No if they clearly already have an outbound stack.

signals.name: Enterprise RevOps
signals.description: Has a mature RevOps / Salesforce setup — not our buyer
signals.llm_definition: Mark Yes if the company has a dedicated RevOps team, Salesforce administrator, or uses enterprise CRM and sales enablement tools at scale. These companies already have a mature outbound stack and are not a fit. Mark No if they appear early-stage or lack a formal sales ops function.
